name: Government Services
description: Workflow templates for reviewing public government information, forms, support, and language access pages.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Find eligibility information
workflows.description: A resident tries to determine whether they may qualify for a public service or benefit.
required_actions: Find next steps or contact channel
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Download public form
workflows.description: A resident tries to find and download a public service form.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Submit grievance or contact form
workflows.description: A resident tries to use a public grievance, feedback, or contact form with permitted test data.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Find helpline or support
workflows.description: A resident tries to find official support channels, service hours, and emergency notes.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Change language or access translation
workflows.description: A visitor tries to find a language selector or translated content.
required_actions: Change language or open translated resource
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
